mapper.sql: id, parent_id, category_name, sort_no, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO df_task_category (parent_id, category_name, sort_no, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{categoryName}, #{sortNo}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE df_task_category SET parent_id = #{parentId}, category_name = #{categoryName}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM df_task_category WHERE category_name = #{categoryName} AND deleted = 0
AND parent_id = #{parentId}
AND parent_id IS NULL
LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM df_task_category WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM df_task_category WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM df_task WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM df_task_category WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
